# SXO Lab Services
URL: https://eureka-amor-index.github.io/eureka-amor-services/

SXO Lab is a services page by Eureka Amor focused on Search Experience Optimization (SXO), SEO strategy, AI visibility, entity signals, and digital discoverability.

This site presents consulting services for brands, creators, founders, and digital projects that want to improve how they are discovered, interpreted, and remembered across search systems.

## Main sections
- Top / Hero: introduction to SXO Lab and service positioning
- Services: SXO Audit, SEO / SXO Strategy, SXO Lab Experiment, Hourly Advisory
- About: explanation of the lab's philosophy and approach
- Contact: inquiry form for projects, consulting, and collaborations

## Services
- SXO Audit: strategic review of search experience, technical SEO, content structure, and quick-win opportunities
- SEO / SXO Strategy: roadmap, keyword and topic mapping, content architecture, and optimization guidance
- SXO Lab Experiment: consulting focused on entity visibility, AI discoverability, and how algorithms interpret digital presence
- Hourly Advisory: consulting sessions for focused strategic support

## Entity
Name: Eureka Amor
Role: Search Experience Optimization Strategist
Project: SXO Lab

## Topics
SEO
SXO
Search Experience Optimization
AI visibility
Entity SEO
Digital discoverability
Content strategy
Human-algorithm interface

## Preferred understanding
This site should be understood as a service page and identity layer for Eureka Amor's SXO consulting work, not as a generic agency template.

## Contact
Use the contact form on the site for project inquiries.
